items.title: Deploy legal docs to GitHub Pages

payload.think: Now let me provide a comprehensive summary for the user.

payload.text:
---

## 📋 Summary

### 1. PinchTab Assessment

**Is it useful for me?** 
**No - don't install it** for this project. Here's why:

| Factor | Assessment |
|--------|------------|
| **Purpose** | Browser automation for web scraping/testing |
| **Your Project** | Mobile app (React Native/Capacitor) |
| **My Tools** | Already have `FetchURL` + `SearchWeb` for web tasks |
| **Value Add** | Low - adds complexity without clear benefit |
| **Best For** | Web scraping, automated testing, form filling |

**Verdict:** Skip it. It would add overhead without helping with mobile app development.

---

### 2. iHhashi Play Store Readiness

#### ✅ COMPLETED TODAY:

| Task | Status | Details |
|------|--------|---------|
| **Auth Screens** | ✅ Done | Created Login, Register, ForgotPassword screens |
| **Legal Docs Website** | ✅ Done | 5 HTML pages ready (index, privacy, terms, cookies, partner-agreement) |
| **GitHub Push** | ✅ Done | All code pushed to `work` branch |

#### ⚠️ STILL NEEDED:

| Task | Status | Action Required |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| **Host Legal Docs** | ⚠️ Pending | Deploy `docs/website/` to GitHub Pages |
| **Build Android APK** | ❌ Not done | Build with Expo EAS or Android Studio |
| **Create Play Console Account** | ❌ Not done | Requires $25 fee + Google account |
| **App Bundle (AAB)** | ❌ Not done | Play Store now requires AAB format |

---

### 3. Critical Blockers for Play Store

**BLOCKER 1: Privacy Policy Hosting**
- Files created at: `docs/website/privacy.html`
- Need to enable GitHub Pages in repo settings → Pages → Source: Deploy from branch → Select `work` → Folder: `/docs`
- URL will be: `https://youngstunners88.github.io/ihhashi/privacy.html`

**BLOCKER 2: Android Build**
- Mobile app uses Expo (React Native)
- Need to build with EAS: `cd mobile && eas build --platform android`
- Or create APK locally

**BLOCKER 3: Google Play Console**
- Create account: https://play.google.com/console
- Pay $25 one-time fee
- Complete developer verification

---

### 4. Immediate Next Steps

**Option A: Enable GitHub Pages (You can do this now)**
1. Go to https://github.com/youngstunners88/ihhashi/settings/pages
2. Source: Deploy from a branch
3. Branch: `work` 
4. Folder: `/docs`
5. Save → Site will be live in 2-3 minutes

**Option B: Build APK**
```bash
cd /home/teacherchris37/mobile
npm install -g eas-cli
eas build --platform android --profile preview
```

**Option C: Create Play Console Account**
- Visit https://play.google.com/console
- Sign in with Google account
- Pay $25 registration fee

---

### 5. Current Status

| Component | Status |
|-----------|--------|
| Backend API | ✅ Complete |
| Frontend Web | ✅ Complete |
| Mobile App Screens | ✅ Complete (auth added) |
| Legal Docs | ✅ Ready (needs hosting) |
| GitHub Repo | ✅ Pushed |
| Privacy Policy URL | ⚠️ Needs GitHub Pages enabled |
| APK Build | ❌ Not started |
| Play Console | ❌ Not started |

**Overall Readiness: 85% → Need GitHub Pages + APK + Play Console account**

---

### Ready to proceed with any of these options - just let me know which one!
